description_long: This is an old, heavily weathered four-door sedan with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of mid-to-late 20th-century Eastern European cars. The exterior is covered in extensive rust, grime, and dark stains, giving it a neglected, abandoned appearance. The windows are opaque and dark, obscuring any view of the interior, while the headlights and taillights are yellowed and dim. The body panels show signs of wear, with visible dents, scratches, and patches of corrosion, especially around the wheel wells and lower sections. The wheels are simple, dark, and appear to be made of steel, with no visible hubcaps or decorative elements. Overall, the car exudes a sense of decay and urban dereliction, suitable for post-apocalyptic or rundown city environments.
description: A rusted, grimy four-door sedan with a boxy shape, darkened windows, and heavily weathered metal surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows a rusted hood, yellowed headlights, and a corroded grille, emphasizing the car's neglected state.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals four doors, extensive rust patches, and dark, worn wheels, highlighting the car's boxy silhouette.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a corroded trunk, faded taillights, and more rust, with no visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing four doors, heavy rust, and dark wheels, with additional grime and wear.
attribute_wheel_design: Simple, dark steel wheels with no visible spokes or hubcaps, heavily worn and corroded
